_scope: 15 new failure modes for SS15-SS20; original 35 carried forward unchanged

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Template cache miss storm on new vertical launch
failure_effects: TTFB breaches EC2 ≤ 200ms target
User sees loading state where skeleton expected
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Signal classifier (SS16) routes to unrecognized vertical; template family not pre-baked
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Fallback template: generic B2B SaaS family serves as catchall; SS17 proposes new family when >5% of sessions hit fallback
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Dashboard: per-family hit count; SS17 proposal queue

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Edge cache stale after template revision
failure_effects: Users see outdated template content
PC.2 quality regresses invisibly
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Template deploy does not invalidate CDN; TTL dominates
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Template keys include sha of content; deploy script purges edge cache; version stamp in skeleton
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Version stamp visible in dev tools; E2E regression test per template family

failure_effects: User enters B2C but gets B2B SaaS templates
Skeleton content wrong → PC.6 trust crashes
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Rule-based lookup misinterprets ambiguous signals; kNN fallback centroids insufficient
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Confidence threshold on classifier; below threshold → user picks family explicitly + audit the miss for SS17
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Confidence-score logged per classification; review weekly

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Proposed change regresses quality, gate misses it
failure_effects: PC.2 quality regresses in production
User trust erodes; SS18 sees completion drop after deploy
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Golden-eval set inadequate coverage; change passes eval but fails on real traffic pattern
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Shadow-only policy for v1 (no auto-deploy); canary deploy with rapid rollback trigger on KPI regression; golden-eval expands via SS17 recorded failures

failure_effects: SS17 optimizes EC1 cache hit by inflating cache at quality cost
Speed metric looks good; quality silently degrades
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Single-metric optimization; no composite quality guard
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Multi-objective objective function (Pareto); every proposed change evaluated across full PC set; EC26 guards

failure_effects: Bad design ships based on 50-user A/B
Churn in UX hurts PC.6 trust
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Low traffic at v1 → statistical significance impossible on short tests
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Bayesian priors from industry benchmarks; min-duration floors; hold any high-impact change until N reaches threshold
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Power-analysis report on every experiment decision

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Experiments stack multiplicatively, confound each other
failure_effects: Cannot attribute signal to individual test
False-positive wins deployed
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: 4+ concurrent A/Bs per EC25 without proper isolation
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Orthogonal assignment; multi-variant analysis; limit 4 per user simultaneously, not 4 globally

failure_effects: Re-rank breaches EC23 250ms
Memory growth; session state bloats
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Unbounded expansion — every resolution spawns multiple children; deep nesting
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Hard cap on tree size (32 nodes); prune low-info-gain branches; depth limit of 5
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Tree-size metric per session; alert at 24

failure_effects: Asks low-info questions first
User wastes turns on irrelevant details → PC.6 trust hit
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Early sessions have no training data for info-gain predictor
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Cold-start uses hand-curated entropy priors per template family (highest-rated templates' known unknowns); SS17 tunes as traffic grows
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Per-session info-gain log; review sample weekly

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Heavy-render queue backs up, delay exceeds 5s
failure_effects: User waits past EC5 ≤ 5s budget
Heavy artifacts (ppt/xlsx) delivered late; PC.1 total time stretched
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: BullMQ worker capacity insufficient under load; python pptx generation slow
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Auto-scale workers based on queue depth; precompute pptx/xlsx skeletons at template-ship time (swap placeholders, not generate from scratch)
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Queue-depth gauge; worker autoscale policy; SLI/SLO on p95 delivery

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Text-stream and heavy-render diverge on shared constants
failure_effects: Text says PROBE_FREQUENCY=6, heavy pptx says 10; inconsistent artifact set
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Parallel agents arrive at different values before join-gate; heavy-render completes before join
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Join-gate before heavy-render finalizes; shared constants resolved in a join step using M6-style invariant check
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Consistency check job; artifact diff on rerun

failure_effects: User returns, must re-enter facts already given
EC14 context re-entry cost > 0 → PC.4 violated
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Session lookup latency breaches sub-200ms budget; fallback to empty state
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Edge-persisted session summary (Vercel Edge Config) + full context in Postgres loaded async; skeleton renders with summary while full context hydrates
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Recall metric per session; first-N-turns repeat-asking audit

failure_effects: SS12 returns recommendations with low confidence
User trusts stale defaults, makes bad decisions
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Customer doesn't install Probe SDK (SS9); or SDK covers < 50% of stack
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: v3 requirement: SS12 detects PC.5 coverage < 50% → falls back to vendor-doc defaults with explicit 'low confidence' flag to user; encourages SDK install to unlock full recommendations
new_failure_modes.troubleshooting: Confidence flag surfaced in every recommendation; coverage dashboard

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Parallel fan-out produces inconsistent template specializations
failure_effects: Different agents interpret same template slot differently
Cross-artifact inconsistency
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Shared state not synchronized across parallel branches; SS20 join-gate insufficient
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Pinned shared-context object passed immutably to each agent; consistency check on join

new_failure_modes.failure_mode: Edge skeleton renders before auth state resolves
failure_effects: Unauthenticated user sees authenticated-looking skeleton
Confusion; potential security optics issue
new_failure_modes.possible_cause: Skeleton is zero-RTT; auth check requires RTT
new_failure_modes.corrective_action: Skeleton renders with neutral state; auth-dependent regions replaced on client-side hydration; 'loading' shimmer until confirmed

residual_risks_for_v1_1: F.39 Auto-improve regression beyond shadow-only — lifts to v1.1 when we consider auto-deploy with rollback
F.41 Underpowered experiments — lifts to v1.1 when traffic > 10k DAU enables proper A/B
